scripts.dev: npm run dev:db && concurrently -n "api,bff,web" -c "bgBlue.bold,bgGreen.bold,bgYellow.bold" --kill-others-on-fail "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:bff" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.dev:api: cross-env PYTHONPATH=backend venv/Scripts/python -m uvicorn app.api.main:app --reload --reload-dir backend --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000
scripts.setup: npm install && venv\Scripts\pip install -r backend/requirements.txt && npm --prefix bff install && npm --prefix frontend/client install
